title: Day 5 Lesson 2 - Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - らいしゅう の てすと は なんじ から なんじ まで ですか。(Raishuu no testo wa nanji kara nanji made deska?) = Next week's test will be from what time to what time?

Sentence 2 - いちじ から さんじ まで です。(Ichiji kara sanji made des) = It will be from 1 to 3.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
